Unit database source files
==========================

This directory contains the Dart source files generated from the unit database
pipeline.  The pipeline inputs and intermediate data files live in
`assets/units/` (see [assets/units/README.md](../../../../assets/units/README.md)).


Files
-----

### `predefined_units.dart` — generated by codegen

Generated by `dart run tool/generate_predefined_units.dart`.  Dart source with
`const` unit objects, regenerated from `assets/units/units.json`.  Registered
into `UnitRepository` at app startup via `registerPredefinedUnits()`.

**Do not edit by hand.**

### `builtin_functions.dart` — hand-written

Contains the `BuiltinFunction` instances for the 12 mathematical functions
(sin, cos, tan, etc.) and `registerBuiltinFunctions()`.

**Edit by hand** to add or modify built-in mathematical functions.
